overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront promenade from Cyberpunk 2077. The scene features a covered walkway adjacent to a canal with towering glass skyscrapers, a police checkpoint with NCPD vehicles, and overhead digital billboards. The atmosphere is overcast with diffused natural lighting and wet reflective surfaces typical of high-end game engine rendering.

events.description: camera pans right from water view toward covered pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: standing at waterfront railing then turning to face the covered promenade walkway

entered.detail: dark reflective water of the urban canal with gentle ripples
cluster of towering glass and steel skyscrapers with neon accents across the water
series of curved metal arches with integrated yellow lighting forming a covered pedestrian structure
silver metal safety railing along the water's edge with yellow accent posts

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a view across a dark canal toward a futuristic skyline of glass towers. The camera turns right to reveal a covered walkway with distinctive arched canopies and orange paving, transitioning from the open waterfront to the sheltered promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: police checkpoint on covered waterfront walkway

events.description: begins walking forward through police checkpoint area
passes close by woman in red top who temporarily fills the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the police checkpoint between parked vehicles and officers

notable_agents.action: woman in red blouse and black skirt standing with arms crossed facing the camera
armed security officer in tactical gear standing guard beside the green sports car

entered.detail: white and green police sedan with NCPD markings and light bar
dark green vintage-style sports car with black stripe
series of suspended holographic advertising screens displaying various products
orange and white striped concrete barrier with warning lights

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a police checkpoint under the covered walkway. Two police vehicles are parked on the orange pavement while officers stand guard. A woman in red stands with arms crossed as the camera passes between the vehicles, with digital billboards hanging overhead from the curved canopy structure.

events.description: exits police checkpoint area into open promenade section with moderate pedestrian traffic
child pedestrian begins running ahead on the walkway moving away from camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered promenade observing the digital billboards and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: child in dark shirt and shorts running ahead toward the distant overpass

entered.detail: elevated highway interchange with multiple levels of roadways crossing ahead
raised concrete highway with support pillars running parallel to the walkway

segments.scene_description: Leaving the checkpoint behind, the camera proceeds along the covered promenade with digital billboards suspended overhead. The walkway is lined with metal railings on the left overlooking the canal, while traffic moves on the elevated highway to the right. A child begins running ahead toward a complex overpass structure visible in the distance.

events.description: overpass bridge structure becomes more prominent as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: continuing along walkway following the running child toward the overpass junction

notable_agents.action: child continuing to run ahead toward the overpass structure gradually moving further away

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the covered walkway as the overpass bridge looms larger ahead. The child runs further into the distance while the camera passes under successive arches of the canopy. The walkway remains bordered by the canal on the left and the elevated highway on the right, with the complex interchange structure marking the destination ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open waterfront view toward a complex urban overpass along a sheltered cyberpunk promenade. It begins by looking across a dark canal at a skyline of glass towers before turning right to enter a covered walkway characterized by arched canopies and orange paving. As the camera proceeds, the scene shifts into a police checkpoint where officers and a woman in red stand guard beside parked vehicles under suspended digital billboards. The perspective then opens up as the camera leaves the checkpoint behind, gliding past metal railings and an elevated highway while a child begins running ahead. Finally, the movement continues under the successive arches of the canopy, with the distant interchange structure looming larger as the destination.
